name: Incorrect Check of Function Return Value
description: The product incorrectly checks the return value from a function, failing to properly detect errors or exceptional conditions. Unlike CWE-252 where the return value is entirely unchecked, here it is checked but the check logic is wrong (e.g., checking for the wrong error code or inverting the condition).
detection_pattern: Look for EXTERNAL or TRANSFORM nodes (function calls, system calls) whose return values flow through a CONTROL node (conditional check) that performs an incorrect comparison or uses the wrong expected value, without a proper CONTROL mediator (correct return value validation per function specification) that accurately detects failure states.
